title: pilosella auriculina subsp. subteneriuscula
intro: Pilosella auriculina subsp. subteneriuscula, also known as a rare subspecies of the Pilosella auriculina plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pilosella auriculina subsp. subteneriuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve antioxidant defenses, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a promising candidate for the treatment of various diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using a tincture made from the plant's extracts.
